'''Tadening Foodmakers''' was a localized company on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aphran IV]]. They became very successful during the rule of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], becoming the largest distributor of [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] on the planet.

{{Company-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' {{1st}}
